overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy running along a tropical post-apocalyptic beach. The character moves from sandy shores past rusted shipwrecks and rock formations, then ascends a vegetated coastal slope with distinctive red foliage and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach with rusted shipwrecks and cliff face

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the sandy beach with a bow equipped, moving past shipwrecks on the left

entered.detail: large rusted metal shipwreck partially buried in sand with orange-brown corrosion
steep dark rock cliff covered with green vegetation on top
calm blue ocean water with distant islands visible on the horizon
scattered palm trees lining the distant coastline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright tropical beach with the character running along white sand. A large rusted shipwreck lies partially buried on the left, while a steep cliff face rises prominently on the right. The ocean stretches out ahead under a partly cloudy sky, with distant palm trees visible along the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach approach to rock pillar formations

events.description: character navigates around the base of a tall rock pillar while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach path at steady pace, maneuvering around natural rock formations

entered.detail: tall vertical rock pillar with layered striated structure rising from the beach

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the beach as the shipwreck recedes into the background. A prominent tall rock pillar comes into view ahead and is passed on the right side. The cliff face remains visible but distant on the right, while the beach stretches open toward the ocean ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal hillside with dense red vegetation and palm canopy

events.description: character transitions from running on flat sand to ascending the vegetated slope
environment changes from open beach to dense tropical vegetation with distinctive red foliage

agents.ego_description: climbing up the hillside through dense red vegetation and palm trees, overlooking the beach below

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green fronds creating partial canopy overhead
dense patches of distinctive bright red grass-like plants covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the beach behind and begins ascending a slope covered in dense red vegetation. Tall palm trees create a partial canopy overhead as the camera moves through the foliage. The ocean remains visible in the distance below, while the cliff face continues along the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open tropical beach into a densely vegetated coastal slope. It begins with the character running across white sand past a large, rusted shipwreck buried on the left and a steep cliff face rising to the right. As the shipwreck recedes into the background, the camera tracks forward past a prominent tall rock pillar on the right while the beach opens up toward the distant ocean. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the shoreline to ascend a slope, where the sandy terrain is replaced by thick red vegetation. Finally, the camera moves through a partial canopy of tall palm trees, leaving the ocean visible in the distance below while the cliff face continues to flank the path.
